basicDetails.implementingAgency: Secondary Education Department, Government Of Uttarakhand

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the spoken English skills of students of Classes 9 to 12 studying in all government schools across the districts of the state of Uttarakhand.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Enhancement of Spoken English Programme” is implemented under the Samagra Shiksha Programme by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to enhance the spoken English skills of students of Classes 9 to 12 studying in all government schools across the districts of the state.
schemeContent.benefits_md: The programme was implemented for approximately 39,000 students of Classes 9 to 12 across 109 government schools in all districts of the state.

children.text: The scheme “Enhancement of Spoken English Programme” is implemented under the Samagra Shiksha Programme by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to enhance the spoken English skills of students of Classes 9 to 12 studying in all government schools across the districts of the state.
The programme was implemented for approximately 39,000 students of Classes 9 to 12 across 109 government schools in all districts of the state.
All students from the 109 selected schools, chosen based on factors such as internet connectivity, student strength, and availability of devices for online programmes.

applicationProcess.process_md: All students from the 109 selected schools, chosen based on factors such as internet connectivity, student strength, and availability of devices for online programmes.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a student of Classes 9 to 12 from one of the 109 selected government secondary schools in Uttarakhand.

children.text: The applicant must be a student of Classes 9 to 12 from one of the 109 selected government secondary schools in Uttarakhand.
